assertions.text: No items are eaten during the process.
assertions.evidence: In every step where the farmer leaves items alone, they are either incompatible (Wolf/Cabbage) or safe (Cabbage alone, Wolf alone, Goat alone).

assertions.text: The farmer takes the goat first.
assertions.evidence: The sequence begins with the Farmer and Goat crossing from Left to Right.
The sequence (F+G>, F<, F+W>, F+G<, F+C>, F<, F+G>) consists of 7 one-way trips.
